taxonomy: Pedilonum purpureum belongs to the family Pedilanthaceae. This plant is a species of flowering plant. Pedilonum purpureum is native to tropical Africa. It is classified in the order Malpighiales, within the class Magnoliopsida. The plant's classification is part of the broader taxonomic hierarchy in the kingdom Plantae.
